title: Viners Glamour Cutlery Set | 18/0 Stainless Steel, 16-Piece
features: 16-Piece SET - Add that dazzling finishing touch to any table setting with the Glamour collection, This set is ideal for everyday use and when having guests, the set includes 4 x table knives, 4 x table forks, 4 x tea spoons and 4 x dessert spoons

STRENGTH and DURABILITY - Made from the finest 18/0 quality steel, our cutlery is polished to a lustrous mirror finish, the set is hard wearing, resistant to rust and can be put in the dishwasher, these sets will serve you for a lifetime

DASH OF GLAMOUR - This collection has that special glamorous texture on the handles that sets it apart from other cutlery, find the one that suits your needs from our range, from the 16-Piece to our 24-Piece sets packaged in a beautiful gift boxes

VINERS ELEGANCE - Over 110 years ago the Viners brand was first created and has become a much-loved household name, steeped in British heritage, We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cutlery hat comes with a 25 year guarantee
description: From the manufacturer Fleur Cutlery Set Gift Box Sphere Cutlery Set Nightingale Cutlery Set Gift Box Twist Cutlery Set Gift Box Angel Cutlery Set Gift Box Tabac Cutlery Set Gift Box Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.9 out of 5 stars 15 4.2 out of 5 stars 46 4.8 out of 5 stars 30 4.6 out of 5 stars 167 4.5 out of 5 stars 823 4.5 out of 5 stars 279 Price — no data — no data — no data — no data — no data £41.32 £ 41 . 32 Description With a striking textured pattern, Fleur will be sure to add a unique style to your dining experience. Made from quality 18.0 stainless steel with a mirror finish. The Viners Sphere cutlery set features a beautiful simplistic design adding sophistication to any table. Made from quality 18.0 stainless steel and each piece of cutlery is finished with a high mirror polish. Taking a modern twist on the classic teardrop handle, Nightingale boasts a decorative embossed bird design and mirror finish. The curved handle creates a sense of comfort and balance during use. Made from 18.0 stainless steel. Elegantly shaped handles designed to appear with a twist. Simple for everyday use but equally perfect in a formal setting. Mirror finish. A graceful arc sweeps across Angels contemporary handle forming a subtle curve. The rust-resistant Angel 24 piece cutlery set is made with quality 18/0 stainless steel with a mirror finish. With a handle design that gently flows to form a classic teardrop shape, the Tabac cutlery set is made from quality 18/0 stainless steel with a high mirror polish.
